zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan於從1290年到1297年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾洛姆丘斯時，他的父親Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan33歲，母親Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan28歲。他於大約1320年與Lady Florence of Cawdor在蘇格蘭乃爾史爾卡多爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1386年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾，埋葬在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾洛哈。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan于从1290年到1297年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾洛姆丘斯时，他的父亲Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan33岁，母亲Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan28岁。他于大约1320年与Lady Florence of Cawdor在苏格兰乃爾史爾卡多爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1386年在苏格兰音巴內-爾，埋葬在苏格兰音巴內-爾洛哈。

nameMeanings.name: Mackintosh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McIntosh
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Toisich ‘son of the chief’. Compare Mackintosh .

History: Clan Mackintosh is a Highland Scottish clan claiming descent from Shaw McDuff, a 12th-century chief (second son of Duncan, Earl of Fife), who established the traditional family seat at Perry, Morays. The chiefs of Clan Mackintosh have been regarded as leaders of the Chattan Confederation since 1291.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan was born from 1290 to 1297, in Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland, his father, Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan, was 33 and his mother, Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan, was 28. He married Lady Florence of Cawdor about 1320, in Cawdor, Nairnshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 1386, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, and was buried in Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan est né du 1290 au 1297, à Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Lady Florence of Cawdor environ 1320, à Cawdor, Nairnshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1386, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, et a été enterré à Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan von 1290 bis 1297 in Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan 33 und seine Mutter Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan 28. Er hat um 1320 in Cawdor, Nairnshire, Scotland Lady Florence of Cawdor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1386 in Inverness-shire, Scotland und wurde in Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan è nato il da 1290 a 1297 nel Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Lady Florence of Cawdor circa 1320, nel Cawdor, Nairnshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1386, nel Inverness-shire, Scotland, e fu sepolto a Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattanがから1290年まで1297年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアロスイエムルチウスで生まれた時，父Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattanは33歳，母Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattanは28歳であった。約1320年にスコットランドナイルンシュアイアカウドルでLady Florence of Cawdorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1386年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで死去し，スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアロチャバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan(이)가 1290년 부터 1297년 까지 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 로스이머c후스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 스컷랜드 나른실르 카w도르에서 Lady Florence of Cawdor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1386년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 럭압어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan nasceu de 1290 a 1297, em Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Florence of Cawdor aproximadamente 1320, em Cawdor, Nairnshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1386, em Inverness-shire, Scotland, e foi sepultado em Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan родился с 1290 по 1297 в местности ротиемурчус, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Florence of Cawdor около 1320 г. в местности кавдор, неирншир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1386 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия и был похоронен в местности лочабир, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan nació desde 1290 hasta 1297, en Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Lady Florence of Cawdor aproximadamente 1320, en Cawdor, Nairnshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1386, en Inverness-shire, Scotland, y fue sepultado en Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland.
